title: tenancy â€” Eloquent observers
description: Eloquent observers this module registers. Each observer's `hooks[]` lists the Eloquent events it acts on plus a description of the side effect. Registered by `TenancyServiceProvider::boot()` via `Model::observe(Observer::class)`.

hooks.description: Auto-generate the ULID+prefix id if not set. Set `status=trialing` and `trial_ends_at=now+14d` when null.
Fires within the same transaction as TenantProvisioning. Does NOT dispatch outbound side effects here (see TenantProvisioned instead).

When `primary_branding_id` is dirty and non-null: eager-load the target Branding and denormalise its logo/color/font fields into the `branding` JSONB. Ensures the workspace picker sees the new brand without a join.
Generate `verification_token` (128-char random). Set `ssl_status=pending`. Set `verification_method=dns_txt` if null.
Persist the expected DomainRecord rows (one TXT for verification, plus CNAME/A per `kind`). Dispatch `VerifyDomainDnsJob::dispatch($domain)->delay(30)` so DNS has a chance to propagate.
If `is_primary` transitions to true, clear `is_primary` on all other Domains in the same tenant (only one primary allowed â€” the partial unique index catches slip-throughs).
Cascade the DomainRecord rows via ON DELETE CASCADE; no observer work needed.
First Branding row per tenant is auto-marked `is_default=true`.
If `is_default` transitions to true, clear `is_default` on all other Brandings in the same tenant.
If this row IS the tenant's `primary_branding_id`, re-fire the Tenant save hook so `tenants.branding` JSONB stays in sync.
Invalidate the `tenant:{id}:branding` cache key. Dispatch `TenantBrandingUpdated` after commit.
First contact per (tenant_id, kind) tuple is auto-marked `is_primary=true`.
If `is_primary` transitions to true, clear it on all other same-kind contacts in the tenant.
For `kind=dpo` and `kind=legal`, require `verified_at` before allowing `is_primary=true`. Refuses with `TenantContactException::verificationRequired()` (422).
Encrypt the raw config bag via the IntegrationConfig cast + KMS pointer. Never persist plaintext secrets.
If `is_active=true`, schedule the first `SyncTenantIntegrationJob` and set `next_sync_at`.
If `is_active` transitions to true â†’ schedule the sync job. If it transitions to false â†’ clear `next_sync_at` and null the sync_cursor.
